groups.label: Legal Professional Network: Audit Trail Preservation
groups.description: Legal professionals sharing a common template arguing to preserve ASTM E2147-18 audit trail standards. Campaign coordinated through a patient safety advocacy network. These comments represent organized legal advocacy for patient safety—the strongest organized opposition to audit trail deregulation.
groups.significance: Organized legal advocacy for patient safety. Not commercial interest. Strongest organized opposition to audit trail deregulation.
